description: Two notes: – This is a cropped version of my file "Doja Cat x Amazon3.jpg". – My file "Doja Cat x Amazon2.jpg" received a copyright violation note (nothing happened and it doesn't appear anymore), to avoid that in the future, i'll explain: the original video link shows the "Attribution Share Alike" license (below the date and the author; Share Alike '3.0' according to Vimeo), in the license template below you can see that it is a free license. :)
